title: WynnHandScale
description: Customize the size, position, and rotation of your Wynncraft weapons in first-person.
body:
# Wynn Hand Scale

**Wynn Hand Scale** is a small client-side Fabric mod made for **Wynncraft players** who want more control over how their weapons look in first-person.

The mod lets you adjust the held item viewmodel so your weapons can look cleaner, smaller, larger, or better positioned in your hand.

![Tasims Glave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1c687a4a95b0dfe5407022e766357a1f0d2c423.png)

## Features

* Scale your held weapon in first-person
* Adjust X, Y, and Z scale individually
* Change the overall item size
* Move the item position on the X, Y, and Z axis
* Rotate the item on the X, Y, and Z axis
* Choose specific hotbar slots where the scaling should apply
* Configure hotbar slots per Wynncraft class
* Create different viewmodel settings for different Wynncraft classes
* Optional Wynntils support for automatic class detection
* Live config changes
* Scrollable ModMenu config screen
* Client-side only

## Optional Wynntils Support

**Wynntils is optional and not required.**

If Wynntils is installed, Wynn Hand Scale can detect your current Wynncraft class by using the class type, such as:

* Mage, Archer, Warrior, Assassin and Shaman

This allows you to use different scaling, position, rotation, and hotbar-slot settings for each class.

For example, you can have one setup for **Warrior** and another setup for **Mage**.

If Wynntils is not installed or no Wynncraft class is detected, the mod will still work normally using the default configuration.

## Why?

Wynncraft weapons can sometimes look too large, too small, or awkward in first-person.

This mod allows you to customize the weapon position and size so it fits your personal preference and looks better while playing.

With optional Wynntils support, you can also automatically use different settings depending on the class you are currently playing.

## Commands

```/wynnhandscale <config/version>```

## Requirements

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

## Optional
- [Wynntils](https://modrinth.com/mod/wynntils)

_*Wynntils is only used for automatic Wynncraft class detection. The mod works without it._
